tagline: Senior Frontend Developer — React, TypeScript, GraphQL & high-performance web apps.

description: Sebastian Ruiz is a Senior Frontend Developer with 5+ years of experience building scalable, accessible, high-performance web applications with React, Next.js, TypeScript, and GraphQL. Currently at Globant working on choicehotels.com.
